Unit III Pump Station
N-1776548 MIGDDN1200 PipelineUSD 27M
48
MIGD
3+
Pump Sets
DN1200
Pipeline
USD 27M
Contract
Water Transmission Scheme N-17765 — expansion of Unit III Pump Station, Abu Dhabi, to increase network capacity by 48 MIGD. DANWAY is the nominated MEP subcontractor responsible for the full electro-mechanical scope including new transmission pumps, VFD drives, MV switchgear, surge vessels, SCADA integration, and associated civil works.
Scope of Work
3 × Transmission Pumps (2 duty + 1 standby) — 24 MIGD each
MV Motors, VFD Drives & Phase-Shift Transformers
Surge vessels — suction and discharge sides
MV Switchgear, LV MCC, UPS/DC systems
Hypochlorination dosing skids & compressed air system
Flow meters, pressure transmitters & field instrumentation
PLC-based SCADA, HMI & LDC/RTU integration
FOC cabling, HVAC, fire alarm & earthing
Project Facts
Contract No.N-17765
ClientTAQA / TRANSCO
Main ContractorSEDE
DANWAY RoleE & M Contractor

Contract ValueUSD 27 Million

Liwa Pump Station

USD 34M
Contract
Water Transmission Scheme N-12192.1 — Madinat Zayed to Liwa & Qusahwira. Fully completed and handed over to TRANSCO, the station is in live network operation. DANWAY delivered the complete MEP package including pump installation, VSD systems, 11kV GIS switchgear, SCADA, hypochlorination and all associated buildings.
Scope of Work
3 × Variable Speed Pumps (2 duty + 1 standby) — 19.2 MIGD total
11kV GIS Switchgear with control & relay panels
Water-cooled MV (11kV) VSD units for pump motors
1500kVA 11kV/415V Station Transformer
Surge vessels — suction and discharge sides
Sodium hypochlorination system with analysers & dosing
PLC SCADA, HMI, RTU & fibre optic integration
All civil, HVAC, fire protection & site security

N-20228 — Mirfa C: Additional Pumps Group to supply DN1200 CS Pipeline to Madinat Zayed. DANWAY is the principal contractor executing the full scope including new pump group, 33kV switchgear building, Electrical Control Building (ECB), pump house, valve chambers and all associated civil, E&M and instrumentation works.
Scope of Work
Additional pump group — full E&M scope to increase capacity
DN1200 CS pipeline supply to Madinat Zayed
33kV Switchgear Building — full electrical fit-out
Electrical Control Building (ECB) construction & fit-out
Pump house civil works & mechanical installation
Valve chambers & external civil works
MV/LV distribution, earthing & lightning protection
Instrumentation, SCADA & LDC integration

Reem Hills DN800
Contract N-20068DN800USD 9.26M● Ongoing
N-20068
Contract
DN800
Pipeline
USD 9.26M
Contract Value
Construction of DN800 Regional Potable Water Package Phase 2 in Reem Hills, Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi. DANWAY is the nominated subcontractor delivering civil & pipeline infrastructure, Hypochlorination Building (AD-46), Water Quality Analyser shelters, TAQA Transmission interface works, and FOC/SCADA integration. Contract value: USD 9.26M (AED 34M).
Scope of Work
DN800 ductile iron potable water pipeline — supply, lay & commission
Hypochlorination Building (AD-46) — design, build & commission
Two (2) WQA Shelter Buildings — TAQA Distribution & Transmission
DN800 & DN600 TAQA Transmission interface works & connections
Fibre Optic Cable (FOC) — SCADA integration to authority networks
Authority approvals: ADCD, TAQA, TRANSCO, DoE, MODON, ADDC
Hydrostatic testing, disinfection & water quality verification
As-built documentation, O&M manuals & full handover package

Sewage Lift Station — KSA
SA-KS011Saudi Arabia6 Sewatec PumpsNWC / TCC

8,486
m³/h per Pump
KSA
Location
SA-KS011
Contract
Job SA-KS011 — Sewage Lift Station Contract No. (2) at King Abdulaziz International Airport, Jeddah. A newly constructed pumping facility equipped with six Sewatec SPN K600-1410 submersible sewage pumps (8,486 m³/h each, 43m head), with 3 duty and 3 standby. DANWAY scope covers full MEP works including pumps, VFDs, MV/LV systems, odor control, earthing and civil & structural works.
Scope of Work
6 × Sewatec SPN K600-1410 sewage pumps (3 duty + 3 standby)
VFD drives for pump motor control
MV/LV electrical installation — switchgear, MCC, distribution
Odor control units — supply, install & commission
Fuel tanks, diesel generator & workshop electrical works
Earthing and lightning protection systems
Civil & structural works — pump shaft wet/dry well
SCADA, penstocks, screens & instrumentation integration
Project Facts
Job No.SA-KS011
ClientNWC / TCC
LocationJeddah Airport, KSA
TypeSewage Lift Station
Pump TypeSewatec SPN K600-1410
Pump Sets6 Nos. (3 duty + 3 standby)
Flow Rate8,486 m³/h per pump @ 43m head
VFDSupplied per pump group
